notableEvents.label: Mickey Gasper GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Gasper grounds into a double play, first baseman Josh Naylor to shortstop Colt Emerson to pitcher Bryce Miller. Andruw Monasterio out at 2nd. Mickey Gasper out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Luis Castillo. Ceddanne Rafaela scores.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Marcelo Mayer singles on a ground ball to right fielder Dominic Canzone. Willson Contreras scores. Jarren Duran scores. Caleb Durbin to 3rd. Marcelo Mayer to 2nd. Throwing error by right fielder Dominic Canzone.
